companion_1.name: Borin the Brave
companion_1.description: A stalwart fighter who increases your attack and draws enemy attention.

companion_2.name: Lyra the Swift
companion_2.description: A nimble scout who increases your speed and critical chance.

companion_3.name: Eldon the Wise
companion_3.description: A sage who bolsters your magic and restores a small amount of MP each battle.

companion_4.name: Mira the Healer
companion_4.description: A caring companion who provides occasional healing during exploration and battles.

companion_5.name: Tharos the Bulwark
companion_5.description: A veteran guardian whose presence greatly increases defense and enemy taunt chance.

companion_6.name: Seraphine the Arcane
companion_6.description: A master of the arcane who significantly boosts MP and spell power for the party.

companion_7.name: Ragnar the Warlord
companion_7.description: A fearsome warrior that drastically increases attack and critical damage.

companion_8.name: Astra the Lifegiver
companion_8.description: A legendary healer whose aura restores HP after each battle and provides large healing boosts.

companion_9.name: Nyx the Shadow
companion_9.description: A silent killer that increases critical chance and deals extra damage from stealth.

companion_10.name: Galen the Tactician
companion_10.description: A battlefield planner who grants small party-wide buffs and improves mission rewards.

companion_11.name: Skiff von Stratoscrate
companion_11.description: A master of forbidden magics who greatly enhances spell power and MP regeneration, born from the darkness of the abyss, she's known as the lord of the abyss.

companion_12.name: Baijiang the shade
companion_12.description: A stealthy ninja who excels in speed and critical strikes, mastering the art of silent elimination.

companion_13.name: Kaelen of the Wild
companion_13.description: A wild druid who brings the power of nature to your side.

companion_14.name: Father Thomas
companion_14.description: A humble priest who provides consistent healing and protection.

companion_15.name: Sir Galahad
companion_15.description: A noble paladin who shields his allies with divine grace.

companion_16.name: Brynja Ironvoice
companion_16.description: A Varak Zevari singer who traded her clan's longhouse for the open road. Her battle-songs harden allies and rattle enemies.

companion_17.name: Ulfar Bear-Hand
companion_17.description: A Varak Bear Warrior cast out of his order for refusing to stop fighting after the war ended. Still the most dangerous fighter on any field.

companion_18.name: Sigrid of Greymount
companion_18.description: The clan healer of Greymount Hold, skilled in northern herb medicine and spirit-binding. Keeps the party alive with stubborn efficiency.

companion_19.name: Scholar Wei Linhua
companion_19.description: A four-times examination candidate from River's Crown whose practical knowledge of eastern lore is unrivalled. Improves item discovery and magical reserves.

companion_20.name: Brother Chen
companion_20.description: The keeper of the River Temple on the Ghost River. Calm, precise, and deeply unsettling in combat for someone who looks so peaceful.

companion_21.name: Jade Automaton Unit-7
companion_21.description: A jade automaton from the Examination Hall that was reprogrammed after a malfunction. Obedient, tireless, and made of hardened jade. Excellent at absorbing damage.

companion_22.name: Grand Examiner's Apprentice Mei
companion_22.description: A prodigy from the Jade Examination Hall who scored highest in the magical theory section. Brings extraordinary spell support and a habit of narrating what she is doing.

companion_23.name: Zara the Corsair
companion_23.description: A former Kalovar corsair first mate who turned freelance after her captain tried to have her killed. Quick, ruthless, and very well-informed about harbour taxes.

companion_24.name: Mirza the Freed
companion_24.description: A man who bought his freedom from the Kalovar slavers and spent twenty years afterward helping others do the same. Resilient and quietly furious.

companion_25.name: Kalovar War Mage Reza
companion_25.description: A Kalovar court war mage who defected after the Grand Vizier ordered him to burn a village. Still has all his spells. Uses them differently now.

companion_26.name: Kassandros the Exile
companion_26.description: A descendant of the Byzantra legionnaires, trained in the old fighting style and carrying armour three hundred years out of date. Every part of it still works.

companion_27.name: Archaeologist Theodora
companion_27.description: The excavator of Constanplea's buried ruins. Knows where all the old things are buried, which turns out to be surprisingly useful everywhere.

companion_28.name: Tara the Mountain Guide
companion_28.description: The guide who has led more crossings of the Spine of Heaven Pass than anyone alive. Knows every trail, every ambush point, and exactly when to run.

companion_29.name: Treaty Keeper Aldo
companion_29.description: The border treaty keeper at the Coldwater Crossing. Better in negotiations than in fights, but twelve years at a violent border has made him surprisingly capable at both.

companion_30.name: Lira the Void-Touched
companion_30.description: A scholar who spent six months studying the Echoing Void and came back subtly wrong in ways that make her extraordinarily effective in combat. She is fine. She says she is fine.
